# baseline: ps4-softgpu
# GENERATED by scripts/run_examples.sh — do not hand-edit; re-run 'capture'.
# Content below is the emulator's combined stdout+stderr, NORMALIZED then
# 'sort -u'ed (order-independent SET of masked event lines). Masks: <TS> time,
# ThreadId(N) host thread, <PID>/<TID>/<ADDR> ids & addresses, <DUR> durations,
# tid=<T>/key=<T>/"Thread <T>" guest thread ids. The winit/display MAIN-thread
# panic (this devShell has no usable wayland/XKB display) is host-env noise and
# is stripped; the process exit code is a panic-vs-guest race and is NOT asserted
# (the guest's real end shows as a "[SYSCALL] exit(0)" line in the body).
# NOTE: softgpu opens a display window and never returns; the 30s timeout KILLS
# it, so a panic/timeout exit (not 0) is EXPECTED. The window/display thread also
# panics in a headless-ish devShell (wayland/XKB), which is why the exit code is
# not 0 — that is fine: only the pre-window boot log is the oracle here.
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::bridge: [KERNEL] RegisterBuffer: ArrayPtr=<ADDR> -> FrameBuffer=<ADDR>
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libSceAudioOut.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libSceGnmDriver.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libScePad.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libSceUserService.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libSceVideoOut.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::hle: HLE: Loaded libkernel.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::process: Kernel: Executable loaded at <ADDR>
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::thread: Kernel: Creating Thread <T> entry=<ADDR>
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::thread: Kernel: Thread <T> jumping...
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_kernel::thread: Kernel: current_tid set to 1
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_libs::libkernel: [GUEST] Double Buffering Test
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_libs::libkernel::mman: [SYSCALL] mmap(addr=0x0, len=<ADDR>, prot=3, flags=<ADDR>)
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_libs::libscevideoout: [VIDEO] sceVideoOutOpen
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_libs::libscevideoout: [VIDEO] sceVideoOutRegisterBuffers ptr=<ADDR>
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_loader::linker: Linker: Allocated Lazy Stubs heap at <ADDR>
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_loader::linker: Linker: Applied 19 relocations.
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_loader::linker: Linker: Loading 'eboot.bin' at <ADDR> (size: <ADDR>)
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_loader::linker: Linker: Required Library: libSceVideoOut.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) ps4_loader::linker: Linker: Required Library: libkernel.so
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- Booting Kernel HLE ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- Kernel: Process created (PID: <PID>) ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- Loading Executable: examples/ps4-softgpu/ps4-softgpu.elf ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- PS4 Native Emulator Boot (Graphics Enabled) ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- [Emulator Thread] Launching Guest ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: --- [Main Thread] Starting Window Loop ---
<TS>  INFO ThreadId(N) unemups4: Kernel: Main Thread Created (TID: <TID>) Stack: <ADDR>, TLS: <ADDR>
=== run complete (process exit code intentionally not asserted) ===
